name: markerai-design-skills
description: Design intelligence skills bundle for MarkerAi: UI/UX, brand, design system, banners, slides, and frontend styling.

plugins.name: markerai-design
plugins.description: Bundle of 7 design skills: ui-ux-pro-max, design, design-system, ui-styling, brand, slides, banner-design. Originally from nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill (MIT), repackaged as a single plugin so all skills load together.
